title: Yupi Gummy Candy Variety (Yupi Cola Burger (24 x 7g individually-wrapped pieces))
features: Wide Variety of Flavors: The Yupi range offers a diverse selection of gummy candies, from fruity classics to tangy and spicy options, ensuring there’s something for every taste.
Fun and Playful Shapes: Each Yupi gummy is crafted in unique, fun shapes like bears, worms, cola bottles, and more, adding a playful touch to your snacking experience.
Made with Real Fruit Juice: Yupi gummies are made with real fruit juice, delivering an authentic, delicious flavor in every bite.
Halal-Certified: Enjoy your favorite gummy candies with peace of mind knowing that the entire Yupi range is halal-certified, meeting the dietary needs of those who follow halal practices.
Perfect for Any Occasion: Whether you’re snacking on the go, sharing with friends, or adding a sweet touch to your party, Yupi gummy candies are the perfect choice for any occasion.
description: Product description Indulge in the delightful world of Yupi Gummy Candy, where every bite is a burst of flavor and fun! Perfectly chewy and irresistibly delicious, Yupi gummies come in an array of exciting shapes and vibrant colors that are sure to brighten up your day. Whether you’re craving the sweet tang of fruity bears, the sour zing of tangy worms, or the playful pop of cola bottles, Yupi has something for everyone. Crafted with care and quality, each Yupi gummy is packed with flavor, delivering a satisfying treat that’s perfect for sharing with friends, adding to your party spread, or enjoying as a quick snack on the go. Made with real fruit juice and free from artificial colors, Yupi gummies are not only tasty but also a guilt-free indulgence. Discover the joy of Yupi Gummy Candy – your go-to snack for sweet moments and tasty adventures! Ingredients Glucose syrup, sugar, gelatin, citric acid, sorbitol, artificial and natural flavors, fruit juice concentrates (apple, orange, pineapple, strawberry, grape), artificial colors (E102, E110, E129, E133), vegetable oil (coconut oil, palm oil), and carnauba wax for shine. The gelatin used is halal-certified.
